title: Status Reporting and Counter Management in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'StatusReporter.java' file defines an abstract class for tracking MapReduce job status and progress. It provides methods for retrieving and updating job counters, progress, and status, ensuring consistent reporting across different job components. The 'counters' directory manages job counters, offering abstract classes and interfaces for creating, manipulating, and organizing counter groups. It employs the Factory Method and Strategy architectural patterns, ensuring efficient and flexible tracking of job-related metrics in Hadoop MapReduce.
